word: G1371 - διχοτομέω - dichotoméō - dee-khot-om-eh'-o - Cut asunder

sections.paragraph:
διχοτομέω - dichotomeō - dee-khot-om-eh'-o

From a compound of a derivative of G1364 and a derivative of τέμνω temnō (to cut); to bisect, that is, (by extension) to flog severely: - cut asunder (in sunder).
